adminExports.title: Admin Bulk Exports
adminExports.subtitle: Generate machine-readable JSON dumps and human-readable PDF/XLSX archives for the data the university needs to hand off. Click a button to download the ZIP directly.

jobsOpen.label: Open Jobs
jobsOpen.description: Currently published jobs whose application deadline has not passed. Includes all submitted applications, ratings and interview data; draft applications are excluded.

jobsExpired.label: Expired Deadline Jobs
jobsExpired.description: Published jobs whose application deadline has passed but which have not yet been formally closed. Includes every application regardless of state.

jobsClosed.label: Closed Jobs
jobsClosed.description: Closed jobs and jobs where an applicant has been selected. Includes every application regardless of state.

full.label: Full Admin Export
full.description: Everything: research groups with their members and every job (drafts included), every application with documents, plus re-importable JSON dumps. Use this for handover to the university or backup.

downloadError.detail: Something went wrong while building the export. Please try again.
